name: Godslayer|one
short_description: Godslayer | one is an indie game adventure with different boss opponents. you can defeat almost any opponent with just one shot - but your opponents can also defeat you with just one hit. Explore a new world with hidden secrets, find and defeat your opponents and try to get better and faster!
detailed_description:
Godslayer | one


Godslayer | one is a small first-person single-player indie adventure game in which you look for unique and bizarre boss opponents. Usually one hit on the weak spot of your opponent is enough to defeat him, but be careful - they will be able to defeat you just as easily with one hit.

Unique experience:

You find yourself only armed with your bow in a mysterious world in which you have to face unique boss opponents. You will die a lot as you learn how to defeat your enemies, but once you know how, you will be able to finish each of them in only a few seconds.

Replayablity:

As soon as you have finished the game, you can start it again and try to minimize your deaths and defeat your bosses even faster!
